steps.title: Identify the appositive
steps.content: The blank must complete the subject noun phrase: paintings by two named US artists. The names Thomas Hart Benton and Jackson Pollock are essential because they identify which artists are meant, so the names should attach directly to artists without punctuation.

steps.title: Remove faulty punctuation
steps.content: Choice A wrongly places a comma before and and leaves a trailing comma. Choice B wrongly uses a colon between a noun and the names that identify it. Choice D wrongly sets off an essential appositive with a comma. The answer is C.
